seoTitle: Redmond West vs Reedy — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Redmond West and Reedy. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Redmond West vs Reedy: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Redmond West and Reedy.
heading: Redmond West vs Reedy — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Redmond West, Western Australia and Reedy, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Reedy has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Redmond West (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Redmond West or Reedy safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Redmond West has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Reedy scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Redmond West scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Reedy scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Redmond West or Reedy?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Reedy has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
